description_long: This is a rectangular office desk with a dark brown wooden top and black metal legs, designed for stability and durability. On the desk sits a full desktop computer setup, including a black tower PC, a widescreen monitor, a standard keyboard, and a mouse. The desk's surface is smooth and spacious, providing ample room for the computer equipment and additional workspace. The legs are T-shaped, made of sturdy metal, and are positioned at each end for maximum support. The computer tower is placed to the left of the monitor, while the keyboard and mouse are centrally aligned in front of the monitor. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and functional, suitable for professional or educational environments.
description: A modern rectangular desk with a brown wooden top and black metal legs, supporting a full desktop computer setup. The desk is spacious, sturdy, and designed for office or study use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full desktop computer setup with the monitor, keyboard, mouse, and tower PC clearly visible on the desk.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the desk and the alignment of the computer components, with the monitor and tower PC side by side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the monitor and tower PC, as well as the cable ports and ventilation grilles on the computer tower.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the width of the desk and the back of the computer tower, with minimal detail of the monitor and peripherals.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the monitor, keyboard, and mouse positioned for direct access, with the computer tower to the left.
